creator: pascal.christen@hostpoint.ch
text:
Hei

What do you guys think to make a change to the haproxy port. This is the "devel" port so it shouldn't contain stable releases. 

And how about updating the "net/haproxy" port from 1.7 to 1.8? My advise is that: Updating the "net/haproxy" port to 1.8 and create a new one "net/haproxy7" for legacy reason. If you (maintainer) will be ok with it I could provide you the patches for this port updating/creating. Thanks for your feedback
